description: Self-hosted file sync, share, and collaboration platform - a private alternative to Dropbox/Google Drive.
changelog: Added reverse-proxy support (OVERWRITEHOST, OVERWRITEPROTOCOL, OVERWRITECLIURL, TRUSTED_PROXIES) to .env - fixes an HTTP 400 'Access through untrusted domain' error when running Nextcloud behind a reverse proxy (e.g. Authentik's proxy provider, Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik).
